Description.description: Description of the IP entry. Cannot start with http:// or https://. Must start with a letter or Chinese character. Can include numbers, English commas (,), periods (.), underscores (_), spaces, equals signs (=), hyphens (-), Chinese commas (，), and Chinese periods (。). Length must be between 1 and 255 characters. If not specified, defaults to an empty string.

Entry.description: IP entry address range. Only CIDR addresses are supported.

AclType.description: Listener control mode for this access control policy group. white: allowlist mode; black: denylist mode

Key.description: Tag key for user tags. Length must be between 1 and 128 characters. Case sensitive. Cannot start with any combination of volc: or sys: in any case. Cannot start or end with a space. Can include characters from any language, numbers, spaces, underscores (_), periods (.), colons (:), slashes (/), equals signs (=), plus signs (+), minus signs (-), and @. Tag keys for the same resource must be unique.

Value.description: User tag value. Length must be between 0 and 256 characters. Case sensitive. Cannot start or end with a space. Supports characters from all languages, numbers, spaces (), underscores (_), periods (.), colons (:), slashes (/), equals signs (=), plus signs (+), hyphens (-), and @.

description: ALB provides access control at the listener level. If you want to allow only certain IPs or deny only certain IPs from accessing the ALB instance via the listener port, you can set an access control policy for the listener. You can configure access control when creating the listener or modify/reconfigure it after the listener is created.

AclEntries.description: Detailed information about IP entries in the access control policy group.

AclEntryCount.description: Number of IP entries in the access control policy group.

AclName.description: Name of the access control policy group. Cannot start with http:// or https://. Must start with a letter or Chinese character and can include numbers, periods (.), underscores (_), and hyphens (-). Length must be between 1 and 128 characters. If not specified, defaults to the access control policy group ID.

CreatedTime.description: Creation time of the access control policy group.

Description.description: Description of the access control policy group. Cannot start with http:// or https://. Must start with a letter or Chinese character and can include numbers, English commas (,), periods (.), underscores (_), spaces ( ), equals signs (=), hyphens (-), Chinese commas (，), and Chinese periods (。). Length must be between 1 and 255 characters. If not specified, defaults to an empty string.

Listeners.description: Detailed information about listeners associated with the access control policy group.

ProjectName.description: Name of the project to which the access control policy group belongs.

Status.description: Status of the access control policy group. Creating: being created. Active: available. Configuring: being configured. Deleting: being deleted.

Tags.description: Tags bound to the access control policy group.

UpdatedTime.description: Most recent operation time for the access control policy group.
